name: snip
description: Ruthless efficiency mode. Challenges code existence before writing a line. 7-rung ladder: delete entirely → YAGNI → stdlib → native → installed dep → one-liner → minimum. Protects auth/money paths with snip:prod annotations.

interface.longDescription: Snip enforces a 7-rung deletion ladder starting with the question 'can this be deleted entirely?'. Language-specific overlays for Python, TypeScript, and Go. Production-safety mode tags auth/money/security paths with snip:prod instead of simplifying them away. CI-trackable snip score metric.
defaultPrompt: Use snip mode for this task.
Review this diff — what can be deleted?
Find the smallest implementation that works.
